viewer.appOnly: Preview is available in the desktop app

onboarding.sub: A local-first knowledge base with a built-in AI layer. Open a vault to begin — everything stays on your machine.
onboarding.vaultSub: A folder with your notes — everything stays local, in plain Markdown files.
onboarding.vaultOpenSub: System dialog; you can create a new folder right there.
onboarding.vaultDemoSub: Demo storage for the browser preview.
onboarding.aiSub: Chat model from .nexus/local.json (editable in Settings → AI / Models).
onboarding.aiNote: Local-first: the index and embeddings live on your device. You can set up AI later — the app fully works without it.
onboarding.indexSub: Runs in the background — you can enter right away; progress shows in the status bar.
onboarding.indexDoneSub: The vault is indexed. Welcome to Nexus.

gen.userNameHint: Used only in the Home greeting; stored locally.

ed.readableWidthDesc: Caps text width for comfortable reading (like Obsidian).

hk.intro: Reassign command shortcuts. Changes are saved locally.
hk.conflict: Conflict: combo used by another command

aiSec.intro: Endpoints of local OpenAI-compatible servers. Stored in .nexus/local.json (outside git) — keys won't be synced.
aiSec.chatDesc: Answers in the AI chat (General and note-grounded modes). Applied immediately, no restart.
aiSec.embDesc: Vectorizes notes for semantic search and link suggestions. Changing it requires a restart and re-indexing.
aiSec.restart: Saved. Restart the app — embedding changed (re-indexing needed).

egress.title: Network (egress)
egress.intro: Outbound connection policy for the core. Applies instantly and survives restarts (stored outside the vault and git).
egress.offlineDesc: Requests to public hosts are blocked before the socket; local and LAN models keep working. An active chat reply is cut off.
egress.chatDesc: Chat model requests (RAG chat, digest, inline).
egress.embedDesc: Vectorization of notes and queries (semantic search, RAG).
egress.probeDesc: Probe requests from “Test connection” to model endpoints.

sidebar.searchHint: Searches titles, paths and tags. FTS is instant · semantic search lives in the palette (⌘K).
sidebar.tagsEmpty: No tags yet — add a #tag to a note.
sidebar.starredEmpty: Nothing starred yet — hover a file in the tree and hit the star.

home.title: Home
home.searchPlaceholder: Search the vault or ask the assistant…
home.briefEmpty: No brief yet — hit “refresh” and the model will describe what's been happening.
home.recentEmpty: Nothing yet — create your first note.
home.goalText: Best streak — **{{best}} d.** {{left}} d. to your record.
home.goalsEmpty: No goals. Add a #goal tag and a progress field to a note.
home.staleEmpty: Radar is clear — the vault is fresh.
home.oqEmpty: No questions yet — hit “refresh” and the model will find open threads in recent notes.
home.driftEmpty: No analysis yet — hit “refresh” and the model will compare your current focus with your goals.

tree.label: Vault files
tree.welcomeBody:
# Welcome to Nexus

This is your first note. A few basics:

- Link notes with [[wiki links]].
- Tag with #ideas.
- Open the local graph (Cmd/Ctrl+G) and the AI chat (Cmd/Ctrl+J).

Delete this note anytime — everything stays local on your machine.

editor.selectFile: Pick a file in the tree, or press {{shortcut}}

graph.title: Graph
graph.empty: Open a file to see its graph
graph.orphanSub: No backlinks — not connected to the rest of the graph.

chat.title: AI panel
chat.modeVaultHint: Answer grounded in your notes (RAG + sources)
chat.modeGeneralHint: General chat with the model — no notes access
chat.localHint: Answers run on your local model
chat.empty: Ask something about your notes — the answer cites the sources it used.
chat.ask1: How does RAG work in Nexus?

denied.offlineSub: Requests to public hosts are blocked by the network policy. Turn it off in Settings → AI / Models → Network (egress).
denied.featureSub: The “chat” network feature is not enabled. Enable it in Settings → AI / Models → Network (egress).
denied.hostSub: The model endpoint is outside the core egress policy. Check the URL in Settings → AI / Models.

suggest.title: Suggested links
suggest.noFile: Open a note to see suggested links.

related.title: Related notes
related.noFile: Open a note to see related ones.

goals.title: Goals
goals.empty: No goals yet. Add a #goal tag and a progress field (0–100) to a note.

digest.title: Changes digest
digest.empty: No digest yet. Click “Generate” — the model will briefly summarize recent changes.
digest.queued: Generation started — the digest will appear here once the model responds.

contradictions.title: Contradiction finder
contradictions.empty: No contradictions found. Click “Find” — the model will compare topically close notes.
contradictions.queued: Search started — results will appear here once the model finishes.

news.title: News feed
news.ctaSub: Once a day Nexus gathers trusted sources, filters the noise, and gives you Russian headlines, summaries and a daily digest — read without leaving the app.
news.consentBody_one: Requests will go to {{count}} trusted source:
news.consentBody_other: Requests will go to {{count}} trusted sources:

reader.footTranslated: Full text translated by a local model. Original at the link.
reader.footOriginalRu: Russian-language source — text extracted from the original without translation.
reader.footDenied: The article lives on a host outside the trusted sources — the egress policy makes no request. Showing the summary; full version at the “Original” link.
reader.footTruncated: Text truncated by the length cap — full version at the “Original” link.

news.emptySub: Auto-run happens once a day while the vault is open. You can refresh manually.
news.caughtUpSub: No unread items in this filter.
news.errorSub: Previous data is kept. Check your connection and retry.
news.neverSub: Start the first run — fetching and summarizing takes about a minute.
news.offlineBanner: Offline — feed paused. Showing last run's data.

inline.ready: Suggestion ready — Tab to accept, Esc to dismiss
inline.errNoText: Place the cursor after some text — nothing to continue

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.auditEmpty: No host calls yet — interact with the plugin.
plugins.privacyNote: Each plugin is isolated in a sandbox iframe; vault access goes only through the capability broker per manifest permissions. Every call is logged.
plugins.revocableNote: Consent is revocable anytime from the plugin card.

vault_read.title: Read notes
vault_read.desc: Reads vault files within the listed scopes.

vault_write.title: Write notes
vault_write.desc: Modifies vault files within the listed scopes.

ai_complete.title: Text generation
ai_complete.desc: Model requests on behalf of the plugin.

net.title: Network access
net.desc: Outbound requests to the listed hosts only.

conflict.title: Resolve conflicts
conflict.upToDate: Nothing to merge — already up to date
